SEARCH

Package org.vorpal.blade.framework.v3

package org.vorpal.blade.framework.v3
As classes from version 2 of the BLADE framework become deprecated, their replacements go here. As time advances, deprecated classes from this package will go in 'v4' and so on.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.vorpal.blade.framework
    This is the base package of the Vorpal:BLADE framework library.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.v3.config
    This package contains v3 code for dealing with configuration files.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.b2bua
    Create simple B2BUA applications with minimal effort.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.callflow
    Utilize Java Lambda Expressions to develop complicated callflows that are simple and easy to read.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.config
    Use the SettingsManager Generics class to dynamically read and write configuration files.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.logging
    Creates a custom "java.util.logging" logger with specific features for tracing SIP callflows.
    org.vorpal.blade.framework.proxy
